creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 192237
py-livereload.shar

Hello,

attached is the shar file for the Python package py-livereload, a WSGI application to watch changes on web files in realtime. It is designed for web developers who know Python.

It also offers APIs for the Django, Flask and Bottle frameworks.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) -> OK
